generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor with TMC4671-Eval driver for horizontal movement control, integrated with Arduino-based control system for precise gantry positioning"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor with TMC4671-Eval driver for vertical movement control, integrated with Arduino-based control system for hoist positioning"
]

instance ElectromagnetController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic pickup mechanism at hoist end for container pickup/drop operations, controlled via Arduino-based system with real-time state feedback"
]

instance ArduinoControlHub : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Arduino-based control system integrating sensor inputs (swing angle, wind speed) and motor controllers (TMC4671-Eval drivers) for coordinated crane operation"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision encoder measuring crane swing angle for motion stability analysis and trajectory correction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor measuring environmental conditions potentially affecting crane stability and operational performance"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Arduino hub aggregating sensor data (swing angle, wind speed) and generating control signals for motor drivers"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoControlHub
]

instance EventTriggerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoControlHub
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D Fusion360 CAD representation of the lab-scale gantry crane used for visualization and kinematic analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaDashboard
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical kinematic model representing crane motion parameters used by trajectory generator for optimal path planning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonTrajectoryLibrary
]

instance ControllerInLoopSimulator : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-based controller-in-the-loop simulator replicating physical crane behavior for offline validation and testing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneControllerSimulator
]

instance CraneStateHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing crane operational states including motor positions, swing angles, and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory data comparing actual executed paths against planned trajectories for validation purposes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EventTriggerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationService
]

instance HarborSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extended simulation model for harbor operations including crane interactions with container logistics environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneControllerSimulator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based TimescaleDB instance storing historical crane operational data and time-series metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard displaying crane trajectories with confidence bounds and operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating asynchronous event-based communication between physical crane and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance PythonTrajectoryLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom gantrylib Python module providing kinematic algorithms for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance CraneControllerSimulator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based crane controller simulator for offline testing and validation of control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module serving as bridge between Arduino control system and digital twin services for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous logging service recording crane state data (positions, angles, wind speed) in TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationalInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical trajectory visualization service displaying crane operations with simulation confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematics-based trajectory generation service computing optimal paths minimizing residual swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides SwingFreePathRecommendation
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryValidationAlert
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing executed trajectories against simulated trajectories using distance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlStrategyValidation
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Crane controller simulator service replicating physical behavior for offline testing and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationTestResults
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneOperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational metrics including trajectory efficiency, swing characteristics, and environmental impact analysis"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for potential faults detected through time-series analysis of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of crane trajectories with real-time and historical data overlays"
]

instance SwingFreePathRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for swing-free trajectories to improve operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts when executed trajectories deviate beyond validation thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative metrics comparing simulated and actual crane behavior for model validation"
]

instance ControlStrategyValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of control strategies through simulation testing"
]

instance SimulationTestResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offline simulation results providing insights into control performance under various conditions"
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale cyber-physical system simulating harbor crane operations for container transport research"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure
    base:contains ArduinoControlSystem
    base:contains CraneSensors
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical gantry structure including cart motor, hoist motor, and electromagnet components"
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCrane
]

instance ArduinoControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom Arduino-based control board integrating sensors and motor drivers for precise crane operation"
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCrane
]

instance CraneSensors : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Sensor suite including swing angle encoder and anemometer for environmental and motion monitoring"
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCrane
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is facilitated through **optimized control signals** and **simulation-based feedback**:
  - **Trajectory Generation Service** computes optimal movement trajectories (e.g., swing-free paths) using a **kinematic model** of the crane and sends commands to the **Control Application**.
  - **Simulation Service** generates synthetic trajectories for comparison with real-world execution, enabling **continuous validation**.
  - **Dashboard notifications** (via Grafana) alert operators if deviations exceed predefined thresholds, triggering manual adjustments.
  The interaction is mediated by the **MQTT broker** for real-time signaling and the **Physical Crane Interface** for command execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates at **millisecond to second time scales**, synchronized with the physical system:
  - **Real-time data logging** occurs at **high-frequency intervals** (e.g., 10–100 Hz for motor positions) to capture dynamic behavior.
  - **Trajectory validation** compares real-time execution with simulated trajectories at **sub-second intervals** for fault detection.
  - **Dashboard updates** occur at **low-frequency intervals** (e.g., 1–10 Hz) for operator monitoring.
  The twin’s services are designed for **online operation**, with minimal latency (<100 ms) for control loop feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as follows:
  - **Physical Side**: Comprises the **gantry crane**, **Arduino controller**, and **motor drivers** (centralized hardware).
  - **Digital Side**: Six **logical services** (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) deployed as **Python modules** and **Docker containers** (for database/dashboard/MQTT).
  - **Interaction Layers**:
    1. **Physical Crane Interface** (Python) bridges hardware and digital twin.
    2. **MQTT Broker** enables asynchronous communication between services.
    3. **TimescaleDB** acts as the central data repository.
    4. **Grafana Dashboard** provides visualization and operator alerts.
  The constellation follows a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with loose coupling between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated** lifecycle stage of the physical system, focusing on **runtime monitoring, validation, and optimization**. It does not model the **as-designed** (CAD) or **as-manufactured** phases explicitly, though CAD models (Fusion360) and Arcadia/Capella models are available for **systems engineering documentation**. The twin’s primary role is **operational twinning**, enabling real-time adjustments and fault detection during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Continuous Validation**: Real-time comparison of **executed trajectories** (from PT) with **simulated trajectories** (from DT) using **distance metrics**. Deviations exceeding thresholds trigger alerts.
  - **Model Validation**: Reuse of **existing model validation techniques** (e.g., [5]) to assess kinematic model accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Simulation confidence bounds (upper/lower bounds) visualized in Grafana to quantify prediction errors.
  - **Verification**: Unit tests for Python modules (e.g., trajectory generator) and **historical data logging** for post-hoc analysis.
  The twin’s validity is **operationally validated** via real-world crane performance and **research-validated** through publications ([4], [5], [6])."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT uses:
  - **Data Protocols**:
    - **MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto)** for asynchronous messaging between services (e.g., control commands, sensor data).
    - **SQL (PostgreSQL-compatible)** for TimescaleDB data storage and querying.
  - **Network Architecture**:
    - **Local network** (Ethernet/Wi-Fi) for communication between Arduino, Python services, and Docker containers.
    - **Bidirectional data flow**: PT → DT via **sensor data logging** and **event triggers**; DT → PT via **optimized control signals**.
  - **Latency**: Designed for **low-latency (<100 ms)** operation to support real-time control loops."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Deployment**: All software runs on a **personal computer** (no cloud dependency).
  - **Containerization**: **Docker Compose** manages the **database (TimescaleDB)**, **MQTT broker**, and **Grafana dashboard** as containers.
  - **Python Services**: **gantrylib** module (Python) hosts all other services (logging, trajectory generation, simulation, validation).
  - **Hardware Dependency**: Requires **Arduino** for sensor/control integration but can be **emulated** for testing (as in related work exemplars).
  The deployment is **self-contained**, with a single command (`docker compose up`) to initialize the digital twin infrastructure."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin supports **limited horizontal integration**:
  - **Harbor System Extension**: Expanded for teaching purposes to include **container identification systems** and **ship digital twins** (e.g., buoyancy models) ([BIP 2024-2025]).
  - **Sensor Data Integration**: Wind speed (anemometer) and swing angles feed into **environmental modeling** for trajectory planning.
  - **No Standardized APIs**: Integration with external systems (e.g., ERP, logistics platforms) is **not implemented** but could be added via MQTT or REST endpoints.
  The current design prioritizes **vertical integration** (PT ↔ DT) over horizontal connectivity."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are governed by:
  - **MIT License**: The entire exemplar (code, documentation, models) is **open-source**, with no restrictions on data reuse.
  - **Data Ownership**: The **physical system owner** (e.g., university lab) retains ownership of logged data, though the **digital twin services** are publicly accessible.
  - **Privacy**: No sensitive data (e.g., user identities, proprietary logs) is stored; data is **anonymized** for research/teaching purposes.
  The exemplar does not address **commercial data ownership** or **GDPR compliance**, as it is intended for **academic/research use only**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards and conventions:
  - **Modeling**: Uses **Autodesk Fusion360** for CAD and **Capella/Arcadia** for MBSE (Model-Based Systems Engineering).
  - **Data Formats**: **TimescaleDB** (PostgreSQL-compatible) for time-series data; **MQTT** for messaging (broker-independent).
  - **No Proprietary Frameworks**: Avoids commercial digital twin frameworks (e.g., Eclipse Ditto, BaSyx) in favor of **open-source, ad-hoc integration**.
  - **Documentation**: Follows **C4 Model** for architecture visualization and **MkDocs** for technical documentation.
  The exemplar does not enforce **industry-wide standards** (e.g., OPC UA, AutomationML) but aligns with **academic research practices**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **No Remote Operation**: The digital twin **does not execute remote commands** on the physical crane; all actions require **operator confirmation** via the Human Machine Interface (HMI).
  - **Localized Security**: The system relies on **local network access** (no cloud exposure) and **open-source tools** (e.g., Mosquitto, TimescaleDB) with default security configurations.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Threshold-based alerts** (e.g., trajectory deviation) prevent unsafe operations.
    - **Manual override** via HMI for critical adjustments.
  - **Limitations**:
    - **No encryption** for MQTT or database communications (assumes trusted local network).
    - **No formal cybersecurity audits**; security is assumed to be sufficient for **academic/research environments**.
  The exemplar prioritizes **operational safety** over **cybersecurity hardening**, aligning with its **educational/research focus**."
]
